title: message_set: no space-membership check before posting to channel
description: The message_set create path in daemon/src/jmap.rs checks only that the chat exists (get_chats), not that the caller is a member of the space owning the channel chat. Any authenticated JMAP user who knows a channel's chatId can post to it. Fix: before inserting the message, verify the account_id is a member of the space that owns the channel using get_space_member_role or similar. Return invalidArguments if the caller is not a member.
